info.name: Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager API
info.description:
The Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager API enables programmatic management of lifecycle policies for automating the creation, retention, and deletion of EBS snapshots and AMIs to meet backup and compliance requirements.

Contact Support:
 Name: AWS Support

variable.description: (Required) The identifier of the lifecycle policy

request.description: Returns the details of the specified lifecycle policy.
